changes: Replaced the Day 1 practice lab version with 2026-07-01-beginner-follow-along-v5 so existing sessions refresh to the new guide.
Added motivation-specific beginner_steps with concrete source examples, privacy-removal examples, prompt-fill guidance, and answer verification guidance.
Rendered beginner_steps as the primary '하나씩 따라하기' card grid before the compact order table.
Renamed the compact table header from '어디서 무엇을 하나요?' to '한눈에 보는 순서' and changed '프롬프트 복사' to '프롬프트 채우기' while preserving old-row compatibility.
Extended backend tests to assert the beginner guide examples and new practice lab version.
